# P10 Announcement Wording Review Template

Related Jira tickets: CM-10, CM-48

Use this template for human review of English/Arabic announcement copy, notification copy, and RTL presentation before accepting P10.

## Announcement Record

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Announcement ID |  |
| Category |  |
| Priority |  |
| Status |  |
| Target type and target |  |
| Requires acknowledgement |  |
| Reviewer |  |
| Review date |  |

## English Review

| Check | Result | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Title is concise and official |  |  |
| Body explains who is affected |  |  |
| Body includes date/time/location when relevant |  |  |
| Call to action is clear |  |  |
| Tone is formal, not chat-like |  |  |
| Priority matches the message severity |  |  |
| Notification title/body preserve the meaning |  |  |

## Arabic Review

| Check | Result | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Arabic title matches English meaning |  |  |
| Arabic body matches English meaning |  |  |
| Tone is formal and suitable for official association communication |  |  |
| Uses clear Modern Standard Arabic where appropriate |  |  |
| Date/time wording is unambiguous |  |  |
| Acknowledgement wording is clear |  |  |
| Notification Arabic metadata is present and correct |  |  |

## RTL Visual Review

| Check | Result | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Page/screen direction switches to RTL |  |  |
| Text aligns correctly in list and detail views |  |  |
| Icons and navigation direction make sense in RTL |  |  |
| Buttons and badges do not overflow |  |  |
| Long Arabic title wraps cleanly |  |  |
| Long Arabic body wraps cleanly |  |  |
| Tables, filters, and modals remain usable |  |  |
| Mobile small-screen layout remains readable |  |  |
